---
id: apply-calibration
title: "Apply a calibration recommendation as a new condition version"
description: "Creates a new immutable condition version using the parameters from a calibration recommendation. Does NOT modify the existing version. Does NOT automatically rebind any tasks — rebinding is always an explicit user action via PATCH /tasks/{id}. Returns tasks_pending_rebind listing tasks still bound to the previous version."
sidebar_label: "Apply a calibration recommendation as a new condition version"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---
import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Apply a calibration recommendation as a new condition version"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/conditions/apply-calibration"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new immutable condition version using the parameters from a calibration recommendation. Does NOT modify the existing version. Does NOT automatically rebind any tasks — rebinding is always an explicit user action via PATCH /tasks/\{id\}. Returns tasks_pending_rebind listing tasks still bound to the previous version.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

</Heading>
